svg.title: Mermaid parallel fragments
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid par and and fragments mapped onto sequencer fragment branches. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/10-parallel/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/10-parallel
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid par and and fragments mapped onto sequencer fragment branches.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
1. Begin primary work [Mermaid: Caller->>Service: Begin primary work]
3. Emit audit event [Mermaid: Service->>Audit: Emit audit event]
